description:
AI picks your tech stack in seconds. 🚀 Describe your project, get two architecture cards back. ⚡ 

Get AI tech stack recommendations live in the browser — this Learning Hub wires a vanilla React frontend to a Node/Express backend calling OpenRouter with a free model. No build step, no bundler, just one HTML file and a small Express server that returns two concrete stack cards for any project description you type.

The result is a full programming reference for 15 languages plus a live AI advisor that reasons through architecture tradeoffs on demand.

🎯 What you'll learn
- How to connect a React CDN frontend to a Node/Express backend calling OpenRouter
- How to structure an AI prompt to return validated JSON stack objects
- How to build a 15-language syntax comparison tool with custom dropdowns
- How Language Insights renders animated metric bars for strategic language profiling
- How Ecosystem Stacks maps complete production architectures as component diagrams
- How to handle API key absence with a graceful "not configured" UI state


🔗 Links
Source code and starter kit: coding-fab.com

The AI tech stack recommendations feature is the centerpiece of this full-stack version — type a plain-English project description and OpenRouter returns a primary recommendation plus an alternative approach, each rendered as a component-level stack card. The programming language comparison tool covers Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C#, Java, Go, Rust, C++, Swift, Kotlin, PHP, Dart, C, Ruby, and R across syntax, frameworks, libraries, and strategic metrics. Subscribe to Coding Fab for more practical builds.

#CodingFab #OpenRouter #WebDevelopment
#LearnToCode #WebDev #ReactJS #FullStack
#Shorts
fulltitle: 15 Programming Languages + Live AI Recommendations | Full-Stack Tutorial #Shorts
